name: **Compare** traditional SEO vs AI visibility strategies for NYC firms?

mainEntity.name: **Compare** traditional SEO vs AI visibility strategies for NYC firms?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**AI needs recognitions/directories; SEO relies on keywords/sites.** Websites invisible in AI.[3] SEO still aids but secondary.[1]

| Aspect | SEO | AI Visibility |
|--------|-----|---------------|
| Core | Keywords | Peer signals |
| Sources | Site | Directories |
| Speed | Fast | 6-12 mo |

**Hybrid both, prioritize AI signals.**[2] **AI now dominates.**
